guidance: 1 GW capacity target retained but slowed; ~50 MW addable from internal accruals
Repower 10 MW old turbines with 6 MW new Suzlon 2.1 MW units; 17.6 MW solar + 9.9 MW wind planned
Larger expansion needs external equity; multiple financing options under evaluation
insights: Operating capacity ~399 MW (392 MW wind + 7 MW solar); +9.9 MW wind added in FY26
FY26 PAT ₹71.6 cr (+70%); Q4 seasonal net loss ₹16.6 cr on weak March-quarter wind
7 MW Tamil Nadu solar commissioned Dec 2025; ~₹16 cr interest refund aided FY26
PLF: newer turbines ~22% vs ~17% older; repowering targeting >30% PLF
concall.orderExecution: 6.6 MW wind (₹62 cr RenFra contract) targeted for commissioning by 31 Jul 2026; initial repowering underway.
concall.source: Q4 & FY26 earnings call (13 May 2026, T. Shivaraman/J. Kotteswari); company filings
